name: Workers comp vs suing for slip at work, which is better?
description: Comp for quick no-fault pay; sue third parties for extras.

mainEntity.name: Workers comp vs suing for slip at work, which is better?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for quick no-fault pay; sue third parties for extras.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp is faster and guaranteed if work-related; suing employer is barred, but third-party suits offer more damages.** Compare no-fault speed vs potential pain/suffering awards.[1] Key factors: (1) Comp: limited benefits; (2) Lawsuit: prove negligence, 4-year limit; (3) Both possible if contractor caused hazard. Assess with attorney. Comp first for quick aid.
